title: empetrum nigrum subsp. androgynum
intro: Empetrum nigrum subsp. androgynum, also known as black crowberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to the Arctic regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Empetrum nigrum subsp. androgynum include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Empetrum nigrum subsp. androgynum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support various health conditions.
